title: How the Trump administration is trying to reshape how elections are run

Liz Landers discussed more with Gabe Sterling of the Georgia Secretary of State's office.

title: Another top military commander resigns following clash with Hegseth
summary: The Army confirmed that one of its most prominent generals would soon be retiring, ending his career and leaving his current job long before expected. Nick Schifrin discussed more with Jim McPherson, the Under Secretary of the Army during the first Trump administration.
